UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2002, DEFAULT PROVE-UP IN SCD218 ON OCT.29,2002 AT 9:00 AM GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. PRESENT:COMMISSIONER:LORETTA M. NORRIS, CLERK:JOHN STOKES, REPORTER:VALERIE PAPALE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JES-COR, INC DBA BLUE BIRD CLEANERS PHELPS, JAMES AKA JAMES DAVID PHELPS SR. $39,323.89 PRINCIPAL, $3,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $700.05 INTEREST, $306.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $43,829.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-24-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Default Prove-Up In Scd218 On Oct.29,2002 At 9:00 Am
Off Calendar Oct-29-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on this dates regular calendar. Present:Commissioner:Loretta M. Norris, Clerk:John Stokes, Reporter:Valerie Papale. Douglas Alan Holloway representing plaintiff.The Court finds there is a default against JES-COR,Inc.dba Blue Bird Cleaners and James Phelps aka James David Phelps,Sr. Judgment filed in the amount of $39,323.89 Principal, $3,500.00 Atty Fees, $700.05 Interest, and $306.00 Costs for a total judgment of $43,829.94 and possession of equipment.
